The following events took place in '''4400 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*After being denied Knighthood and killing [[Matta Tremayne|his master]], a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]<ref name="TOTJC">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref> named [[Freedon Nadd]] explores the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] and encounters Naga Sadow, who sways Nadd to the dark side of the Force. Nadd kills Sadow and establishes himself as a king on the planet [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], where he institutes a policy to banish criminals into the wilds beyond the walls of the city of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]]. Nadd establishes a dynasty of dark side-wielding monarchs.<ref name="NEC" />
*The exiled criminals manage to tame Onderon's wild beasts to become the [[Beast Riders]], and the Beast Riders wage war on Iziz, sparking the [[Beast Wars]].<ref name="NEC" />
*The [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] begin to launch starliners to colonize planets around their homeworld over the next two centuries. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Deaths==
*[[Matta Tremayne]]<ref name="TOTJC" /> 
*[[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]]<ref name="NEC" />
